description: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) is a nationwide, diversified financial services company with $1.6 trillion in assets. Founded in 1852, Wells Fargo provides banking, insurance, investments, mortgage, and consumer and commercial finance through more than 8,700 locations, more than 12,500 ATMs, online (wellsfargo.com), and mobile devices. We’re headquartered in San Francisco, but we’re decentralized so every local Wells Fargo store is a headquarters for satisfying all our customers’ financial needs and helping them succeed financially. We do business with one in three U.S. households. Wells Fargo has more than 265,000 team members in 36 countries across our approximately 90 businesses. At the end of third quarter 2014, Wells Fargo ranked fourth in assets among U.S. banks and was the world’s most valuable bank by market capitalization. In 2013, Euromoney named Wells Fargo “Best Bank” in its Global Awards for Excellence, the first time a U.S.-based bank has won the top award. The Chronicle of Philanthropy ranked Wells Fargo’s corporate giving in the top two among all U.S. companies each of the past two years. Our vision: “We want to satisfy all our customers’ financial needs and help them succeed financially.”

description: Welcome to Ponce Bank Stuyvesant Town located in New York! Ponce Bank was born in The Bronx in 1960. Back then, most banks had abandoned what many perceived as a community in decline, but Ponce Bank saw nothing but potential. Proud of our neighbors, many with a strong immigrant work ethic and entrepreneurial spirit, we invested in the communities where help was needed most. Now we have 13 branches throughout The Bronx, Brooklyn, Queens, Manhattan, and New Jersey. We love our neighbors and we treat every customer as if they are our best customer.   If you love NY and want to be part of a Community Bank that puts 92 cents of every $1* back into your community, we are your bank.   De la comunidad. En la comunidad. Para la comunidad.  Of the community. In the Community. For the community.   *Source: Mighty Deposits

description: Welcome to Ponce Bank 106th Street located in New York! Ponce Bank was born in The Bronx in 1960. Back then, most banks had abandoned what many perceived as a community in decline, but Ponce Bank saw nothing but potential. Proud of our neighbors, many with a strong immigrant work ethic and entrepreneurial spirit, we invested in the communities where help was needed most. Now we have 13 branches throughout The Bronx, Brooklyn, Queens, Manhattan, and New Jersey. We love our neighbors and we treat every customer as if they are our best customer.   If you love NY and want to be part of a Community Bank that puts 92 cents of every $1* back into your community, we are your bank.   De la comunidad. En la comunidad. Para la comunidad.  Of the community. In the Community. For the community.   *Source: Mighty Deposits

The bank additionally offers overdraft protection and wire transfer services. Shinhan Bank America provides various short- and long-term loan products for real estate, construction and automobiles. description: GreatBanc Trust Company offers the highest quality fiduciary services to enhance the financial well being of our clients and our clients' clients. GreatBanc Trust serves a select group of municipalities, corporations, financial institutions, and individuals seeking a partner that provides the most innovative, customized and inspired solutions in the creation and management of wealth. GreatBanc Trust brings together an unparalleled team of professionals, whose average experience in the financial services industry exceeds 20 years. Our management team and staff offer an exceptional depth and breadth of expertise embracing a wide range of professional disciplines, including legal, investment, financial planning, and trust and estate planning. GreatBanc Trust is nationally recognized as a highly skilled, independent ERISA trustee with a specialization in employee stock ownership plans ( ESOPs ), and sophisticated, cutting edge ESOP transactions. GreatBanc Trust provides trust, investment and wealth management services to individuals as well as a comprehensive range of institutional services to corporations, foundations, endowments and not-for-profit organizations. GreatBanc Trust was incorporated in 1989 as a full service trust company. Owned by its employees since 1999, GreatBanc Trust became a subsidiary of U.S. Fiduciary Services, Inc, also an employee-owned company, in 2004. Together with its affiliates, Salem Trust Company and Pennant Management, Inc, GreatBanc Trust supervises more than $20 billion in client assets. While maintaining its special focus, each affiliate is also fully incorporated in the day-to-day business of the others. GreatBanc Trust's innovative approach to problem solving directly grows from the personalized and specialized teams whom we assemble and dedicate to each client.

description: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) is a nationwide, diversified financial services company with $1.6 trillion in assets. Founded in 1852, Wells Fargo provides banking, insurance, investments, mortgage, and consumer and commercial finance through more than 8,700 locations, more than 12,500 ATMs, online (wellsfargo.com), and mobile devices. We’re headquartered in San Francisco, but we’re decentralized so every local Wells Fargo store is a headquarters for satisfying all our customers’ financial needs and helping them succeed financially. We do business with one in three U.S. households. Wells Fargo has more than 265,000 team members in 36 countries across our approximately 90 businesses. At the end of third quarter 2014, Wells Fargo ranked fourth in assets among U.S. banks and was the world’s most valuable bank by market capitalization. In 2013, Euromoney named Wells Fargo “Best Bank” in its Global Awards for Excellence, the first time a U.S.-based bank has won the top award. The Chronicle of Philanthropy ranked Wells Fargo’s corporate giving in the top two among all U.S. companies each of the past two years. Our vision: “We want to satisfy all our customers’ financial needs and help them succeed financially.”

description: As a market-maker in the purchase and sale of exotic currencies in developing countries, Emerging Markets, Ltd, based in New York's financial district, executes transactions throughout the developing world.The company, formed by highly qualified professionals, provides specialized expertise in currency markets. Clients include the US Government, blue-chip multinational corporations, international charitable organizations ( NGO ) and commercial and investment banks that are active in the foreign exchange markets of the devoloping countries of the world.Emerging Markets, Ltd is a private equity fund, and a registered Money Service Business ( MSB ) in compliance with all Federal regulations. Founded in 1993, Emerging Markets, Ltd continues to provide hard currency liquidity for blue-chip multinational corporations, and local currency funding for the Embassies of the United States Government and prestigious charitable organizations.Since 1994, Emerging Markets, Ltd has been approved by the U.S. Government, U.S. Department of State, and the Department of Treasury to provide foreign currency services.Over the years our client base has continued to expand to include many of the most prominent blue-chip multinational companies and international charitable organizations throughout the United States, Canada and Europe.Exchange transactions executed by Emerging Markets, Ltd are structured to allow our clients to execute cross-border currency swaps. As broker, adviser and principal in these transactions, Emerging Markets, Ltd uses currency swaps because they are inherently the most efficient. Cost and risk are minimized. The structure saves time and money for our clients.Emerging Markets, Ltd is dedicated exclusively to currency swaps and exposure management in illiquid or regulated foreign exchange markets. Our research into the economic and political forces at work in currency markets of developing countries provides intelligence critical to anticipating the near term direction of currencies. The officers of the company traveled to more than 50 countries throughout Latin America, the Caribbean, the Middle East and Africa to develop, refine and maintain this focus.Emerging Markets, Ltd advises The U.S. Department of State, NGO's, charitable organizations and multinational corporations on the most effective and cost efficient methods to exchange funds throughout the developing countries of the world. It advises on financial markets and how market participants may obtain optimal exchange rates in the most efficient methods.Emerging Markets Limited corporate office is only a few short blocks from what is now known as Ground Zero of the terrorist attacks on September 11, 2001. Our memory of that horrific event demands that we do all we can to ensure that our business is impenetrable to criminals and those that wish to harm us. Therefore, we are proud to advise our clients and our potential clients that we rigidly follow the letter and spirit of all United States and New York State anti-laundering laws and regulatory requirements.

description: Established in 1999, the Development Bank of Japan offers long-term financing and lending services. The bank provides loans with fixed- and variable-rate interest options. It also offers health care funds and real estate trust beneficiary rights for medical and nursing facilities. The Development Bank of Japan underwrites private bond placements. It provides senior and mezzanine loans and participates in projects through equity investment. In addition, the bank offers debtor-in-possession financing options. The Development Bank of Japan provides subordinated loans, subordinate corporate bonds, preferred and classified shares and hybrid securities. The bank offers advisory services to optimize risk burdens in various businesses. Its clients include Plant Company, Takeda General Hospital, USJ Company and The Dowa Group.

description: Dexia Credit Local is a branch of Dexia, which was born out of the 1996 alliance of the two major European institutions in local public finance: Cr dit Local in France and Cr dit Communal in Belgium. Dexia Credit Local was one of the first cross-border mergers in the European banking sector, which ranks today amongst the 15 largest banking groups of the Euro zone. Dexia Credit Local services two principal markets: local authorities and similar institutions on a global scale and the retail market, mostly in Belgium and Luxembourg. A world leader in public finance, the group operates several subsidiaries and branches in 26 countries. In Belgium and Luxembourg, Dexia Credit Local is one of the top players in retail banking and offers retail services to several million customers. Dexia Credit Local has also developed a private banking business for affluent customers in Belgium, Luxembourg, France and other European countries.

description: Located in New York, Reis was founded in 1980 as a provider of commercial real estate market information and today is among the leaders in that field. It maintains a proprietary database containing detailed information on commercial real properties in neighborhoods and metropolitan markets throughout the United States. The database contains information on apartment, retail, office and industrial properties and is used by real estate investors, lenders and other professionals to make informed buying, selling and financing decisions. The company currently provides its information services to many of the nation s leading lending institutions, equity investors, brokers and appraisers. Reis s flagship product is Reis SE, which provides online access to information and analytical tools designed to facilitate both debt and equity transactions.

description: Established in 1967, Commerzbank AG deals in wholesale banking for corporate and institutional customers. Its business includes corporate, trade, public finance and treasury activities. The bank s areas of expertise include asset and cash management, structured and project finance, syndications, tax advisory and funds transfer. It provides financial services throughout the United States and Canada. Its corporate banking solutions include syndicated and bilateral secured and unsecured revolving credit facilities and term loans. The bank serves various industries, including power, energy, mining and telecommunications. Its additional services include merger and acquisition financing, debt issuance and portfolio management. In addition, it provides trade services that include documentary collection, forfaiting and supply chain financing. Commerzbank AG has a branch location in New York City.

description: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) is a nationwide, diversified financial services company with $1.6 trillion in assets. Founded in 1852, Wells Fargo provides banking, insurance, investments, mortgage, and consumer and commercial finance through more than 8,700 locations, more than 12,500 ATMs, online (wellsfargo.com), and mobile devices. We’re headquartered in San Francisco, but we’re decentralized so every local Wells Fargo store is a headquarters for satisfying all our customers’ financial needs and helping them succeed financially. We do business with one in three U.S. households. Wells Fargo has more than 265,000 team members in 36 countries across our approximately 90 businesses. At the end of third quarter 2014, Wells Fargo ranked fourth in assets among U.S. banks and was the world’s most valuable bank by market capitalization. In 2013, Euromoney named Wells Fargo “Best Bank” in its Global Awards for Excellence, the first time a U.S.-based bank has won the top award. The Chronicle of Philanthropy ranked Wells Fargo’s corporate giving in the top two among all U.S. companies each of the past two years. Our vision: “We want to satisfy all our customers’ financial needs and help them succeed financially.”

description: Welcome to Ponce Bank Smith Street located in Brooklyn! Ponce Bank was born in The Bronx in 1960. Back then, most banks had abandoned what many perceived as a community in decline, but Ponce Bank saw nothing but potential. Proud of our neighbors, many with a strong immigrant work ethic and entrepreneurial spirit, we invested in the communities where help was needed most. Now we have 13 branches throughout The Bronx, Brooklyn, Queens, Manhattan, and New Jersey. We love our neighbors and we treat every customer as if they are our best customer.   If you love NY and want to be part of a Community Bank that puts 92 cents of every $1* back into your community, we are your bank.   De la comunidad. En la comunidad. Para la comunidad.  Of the community. In the Community. For the community.   *Source: Mighty Deposits

title_name: Federal Home Loan Bank of New York
description: Federal Home Loan Bank of New York, serves the financial needs of housing and community development lenders in New York, New Jersey, Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands. The bank offers its members a variety of credit products, lending services, correspondent services and programs and also acts as an intermediary between its members and third parties for interest rate swaps, and uses interest rate exchange agreements as part of its asset-liability management policy. To use the Home Loan Bank s credit, community development and mortgage finance products, a financial institution must first become a member of the Home Loan Bank. Only regulated financial institutions, including savings banks, savings and loan associations, commercial banks, credit unions and insurance companies located in New York, New Jersey, Puerto Rico or the Virgin Islands may apply for membership. The Home Loan Bank of New York is a part of the congressionally chartered, nationwide Federal Home Loan Bank System which was created in 1932 to provide a flexible credit source for member community lenders engaged in home mortgage and neighborhood lending.

description: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) is a nationwide, diversified financial services company with $1.6 trillion in assets. Founded in 1852, Wells Fargo provides banking, insurance, investments, mortgage, and consumer and commercial finance through more than 8,700 locations, more than 12,500 ATMs, online (wellsfargo.com), and mobile devices. We’re headquartered in San Francisco, but we’re decentralized so every local Wells Fargo store is a headquarters for satisfying all our customers’ financial needs and helping them succeed financially. We do business with one in three U.S. households. Wells Fargo has more than 265,000 team members in 36 countries across our approximately 90 businesses. At the end of third quarter 2014, Wells Fargo ranked fourth in assets among U.S. banks and was the world’s most valuable bank by market capitalization. In 2013, Euromoney named Wells Fargo “Best Bank” in its Global Awards for Excellence, the first time a U.S.-based bank has won the top award. The Chronicle of Philanthropy ranked Wells Fargo’s corporate giving in the top two among all U.S. companies each of the past two years. Our vision: “We want to satisfy all our customers’ financial needs and help them succeed financially.”

description: Welcome to Ponce Bank Union City located in Union City! Ponce Bank was born in The Bronx in 1960. Back then, most banks had abandoned what many perceived as a community in decline, but Ponce Bank saw nothing but potential. Proud of our neighbors, many with a strong immigrant work ethic and entrepreneurial spirit, we invested in the communities where help was needed most. Now we have 13 branches throughout The Bronx, Brooklyn, Queens, Manhattan, and New Jersey. We love our neighbors and we treat every customer as if they are our best customer.   If you love NY and want to be part of a Community Bank that puts 92 cents of every $1* back into your community, we are your bank.   De la comunidad. En la comunidad. Para la comunidad.  Of the community. In the Community. For the community.   *Source: Mighty Deposits

description: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) is a nationwide, diversified financial services company with $1.6 trillion in assets. Founded in 1852, Wells Fargo provides banking, insurance, investments, mortgage, and consumer and commercial finance through more than 8,700 locations, more than 12,500 ATMs, online (wellsfargo.com), and mobile devices. We’re headquartered in San Francisco, but we’re decentralized so every local Wells Fargo store is a headquarters for satisfying all our customers’ financial needs and helping them succeed financially. We do business with one in three U.S. households. Wells Fargo has more than 265,000 team members in 36 countries across our approximately 90 businesses. At the end of third quarter 2014, Wells Fargo ranked fourth in assets among U.S. banks and was the world’s most valuable bank by market capitalization. In 2013, Euromoney named Wells Fargo “Best Bank” in its Global Awards for Excellence, the first time a U.S.-based bank has won the top award. The Chronicle of Philanthropy ranked Wells Fargo’s corporate giving in the top two among all U.S. companies each of the past two years. Our vision: “We want to satisfy all our customers’ financial needs and help them succeed financially.”

description: Welcome to Ponce Bank Astoria located in Astoria! Ponce Bank was born in The Bronx in 1960. Back then, most banks had abandoned what many perceived as a community in decline, but Ponce Bank saw nothing but potential. Proud of our neighbors, many with a strong immigrant work ethic and entrepreneurial spirit, we invested in the communities where help was needed most. Now we have 13 branches throughout The Bronx, Brooklyn, Queens, Manhattan, and New Jersey. We love our neighbors and we treat every customer as if they are our best customer.   If you love NY and want to be part of a Community Bank that puts 92 cents of every $1* back into your community, we are your bank.   De la comunidad. En la comunidad. Para la comunidad.  Of the community. In the Community. For the community.   *Source: Mighty Deposits.

Bank Leumi USA, operating in the U.S. for fifty five years, is an FDIC-insured, full-service commercial bank that provides financial services to middle- to upper-middle market firms, and international businesses through offices in New York, Illinois, California, Florida, and an offshore office in the Cayman Islands.  We serve importers & exporters, manufacturers, distributors and retailers in such diverse industries as diamonds and jewelry, textiles & apparel, food & wine, entertainment, real estate, and high technology.   
   
Bank Leumi USA offers U.S. & international private banking services as well as a full range of securities & insurance products through its brokerage subsidiary, Leumi Investment Services Inc.
